where.if: AND ( l.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR l.summary ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR l.diagnosis ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR l.message ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR l.error_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR l.request_url ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR l.page_url ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR l.trace_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') )

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_log_center ( trace_id, log_type, module, sub_module, level, title, summary, diagnosis, error_code, message, raw_data, request_url, request_method, request_params, response_status, user_id, user_name, org_id, org_name, client_ip, user_agent, device_type, platform, page_url, referer, env, create_time ) VALUES ( #{traceId}, #{logType}, #{module}, #{subModule}, #{level}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{diagnosis}, #{errorCode}, #{message}, #{rawData}, #{requestUrl}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestParams}, #{responseStatus}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{orgId}, #{orgName}, #{clientIp}, #{userAgent}, #{deviceType}, #{platform}, #{pageUrl}, #{referer}, #{env}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, l.trace_id, l.log_type, l.module, l.sub_module, l.level, l.title, l.summary, l.diagnosis, l.error_code, l.message, l.user_id, l.user_name, l.org_id, l.org_name, l.env, l.create_time FROM sys_log_center l
ORDER BY l.create_time DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{request.pageSize} OFFSET #{request.offset}

SELECT l.id, l.trace_id, l.log_type, l.module, l.sub_module, l.level, l.title, l.summary, l.diagnosis, l.error_code, l.message, l.raw_data, l.request_url, l.request_method, l.request_params, l.response_status, l.user_id, l.user_name, l.org_id, l.org_name, l.client_ip, l.user_agent, l.device_type, l.platform, l.page_url, l.referer, l.env, l.create_time FROM sys_log_center l WHERE l.id = #{id}
